title: viola alba
intro: Viola alba, also known as the White Violet, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola alba include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help with skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Viola alba include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
